chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl.B.A.No.S-101 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For orders on MA 1360/2024 19-03-2024 Mr. Athar Hussain Abro, Advocate for applicants. ***** By filing urgent application, learned counsel for applicants, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Bail Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Ahmad
